headline.text: L3 ML4 gondola ramp lost homing position *twice in 15 minutes* late on 3rd shift — depositing stopped, tech returning today.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 ran BET caramel trials on Sollich 4 with successful gripper tests on both wrap styles. Sollich 2 cleared a morning USB delay and label-machine wrinkle issue. Recipe discrepancies flagged for Bequet (conflicting temps and invert codes) remain open. Tunnel 1 cover arms won't hold and forming-box markings need attention.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 cleared ML2 flowwrap chicane and sealing issues by 07:00 after overnight maintenance and a centerline correction. ML3 ran with multiple brief belt stops, all cleared same-shift. FFS dialed in Hershey pouch gusset punch and recovered from a QA USB-drive loss. Quiet 24 hours overall.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 Truffle Line cleared a 2.5-hour guillotine PLC issue and multiple M6 belt alignments but closed the window with C6 nose-bar roller still down and a metal-detector switch that can't lock. ML4 Hershey trial deposited full production but stopped at 23:01 when the gondola ramp lost position repeatedly; 3rd shift emptied depositor 1 and techs return today. King-size mold contamination caused three jams across shifts. ML1 tempering cycled through multiple reheats; Preston and Robert adjusted water-jacket setpoints and saw improvement but real test is calling for product without mass-pressure faults.

notes.text: Bequet production scheduled for today with customer on-site at 10:00 for Celtic salt application dial-in; first 2–3 batches will use test film and be scrapped.
Pest control called for bugs found near Sollich 4; warehouse asked to inspect for source.
Water cups out across all three plants; Walmart run planned.
Hershey snack-size pouch now approved with gusset punch and centered tear notch; reference photos posted as gold standard.
Hershey client requested lot-code format change (removed BBD, added flow-wrapper designator); TG3 centering still pending final adjustment.
WIP case weight updated to 28 lbs / 905 pieces after multiple counts; IMS adjusting pallets.

resolved.title: Sollich 2 jar pallets without labels due to USB delay
resolved.summary: Jar pallets accumulating without labels; waiting for USB drive from L2 to program labeler.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:05 — "We have finished passing all the jars that did not have label" after USB arrived from L2 at 07:39 (Victor Romero Sr.).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 label machine producing wrinkled labels
resolved.summary: Labeling machine producing wrinkled labels on jars; Troy and maintenance called.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:47 — Troy "made adjustments to the feed length and the wrapper pad" (Troy Baxter).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 belt and support rollers installed wrong
resolved.summary: Nathan found belt and support rollers installed incorrectly during inspection; could have caused belt replacement if started.
resolved.resolution: Caught during inspection before startup — "we fixed the issues and all is good" (Nathan Coles).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 return valve seal blown during changeover
resolved.summary: Seal on return valve blew during chocolate changeover on Sollich 2.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:03 — "Maintenance has fixed the issue. Chocolate changeover is complete and enrobers are tempering" (Joseph Scott).

resolved.title: Plant totes and floor needed cleanup
resolved.summary: Charity flagged totes and floor needing cleanup near production areas.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 17:00 — Conner "got those areas all taken care of" (Conner Boyd).

resolved.title: Sollich 3 big hopper roller tapped hole stripped
resolved.summary: Tapped hole for the big hopper roller stripped on Sollich 3.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:07 — "It's been fixed" (Caleb York).

resolved.title: Sollich 2 BOM/spec mismatch on MMK thins film version
resolved.summary: Spec sheet shows V2 FW for MMK thins but BOM shows V1; no V1 on hand.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 06:30 — "it has been changed to the correct version 40861-V2" in BOM (Russell Smith).

resolved.title: ML2 flowwrap chicane belts and sealing issues
resolved.summary: Chicane belt centerlines not working for new recipe; maintenance and TG support dialed in positions overnight, then found fold along fin causing seal failures.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:00 — "Line is up and running" after Alan found setting out of centerline, moved it back, and resolved issue (Alan Todd).

resolved.title: ML3 long belt S4M1 stopping itself
resolved.summary: Long belt S4M1 and belt S3M1 stopped multiple times; belts out of sensor scan.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 15:15 — "Line up at 3:11, it continues running well" after fixing belt position and sensor alignment (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: FFS pouch alignment off due to wrong arbor spacer
resolved.summary: New roll put on FFS with arbor that had different spacer, caused pouch material to be spaced off and pouches not sealing.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:04 — "A new roll was put on with an arbor that had a different spacer on it that caused the pouch material to be spaced off" — issue identified and corrected (Mathew Draper).

resolved.title: FFS QA lost USB drive, couldn't change lot code
resolved.summary: QA lost USB drive needed to change lot code on FFS, line down at 22:25.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 22:56 — "Hello team, the USB was found" and line back up (Wilson Amaris Cabrera).

resolved.title: ML3 scraper needed adjustment
resolved.summary: One scraper on ML3 needed adjustment, causing brief line stop.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:29 — "Line up at 2:29" after maintenance adjusted (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: ML3 flow wrap film getting cut
resolved.summary: Flow wrap film cut on ML3, causing brief stop.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:40 — "Line running again" (Molding Line 3 Pack).

resolved.title: Truffle Line guillotine PLC corrupted
resolved.summary: Guillotine faulted on door-close alarm; power cycling corrupted Rexroth PLC program, took line down 2.5 hours until Sollich programmer restored it.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 09:52 — "guillotine is already up and running, ready to start" after program correction; working theory is doors trigger safety alarm if shut wrong, use HMI reset button instead of power cycling (Matt Hatch).

resolved.title: M6 belt misalignment and broken nose piece
resolved.summary: M6 belt found out of position multiple times; 11:39 Nathan reported broken nose piece preventing alignment, maintenance pulled it for repair.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:59 — "We have started up on TL" after 14:06 Nathan reported "M6 is good to go now" (Tyson Fausett).

resolved.title: TG3 lot code out of center
resolved.summary: TG3 flow-wrapper lot code illegible and not passing inspection on 3rd shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 23:54 — "I was able to center lot code, it's now running" (Kimberly Morales).

resolved.title: ML1 C1 & C2 belt stopping intermittently
resolved.summary: C1 and C2 conveyor belts kept stopping; maintenance worked on it through early morning.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 03:00 — Alan reported "waiting for maintenance to center the C2 belt," issue resolved after centering (Alan Greer).

resolved.title: M5 belt running off track at startup
resolved.summary: M5 belt ran off track and halted Truffle Line startup at 05:42.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:56 — "The belt is fixed. Starting up now" (TruffleLine Enrober).

resolved.title: ML4 licking roller over-tightened on molds
resolved.summary: Licking roller 1 too tight, making excessive pressure on molds; Alex adjusted and re-synchronized.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 14:40 — "Back up and running" after adjustment (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: ML1 metal detector belt down
resolved.summary: Metal detector belt not running on ML1 early in window.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 00:08 — "Metal detector belt is back up" (Imperial).

resolved.title: Small cavanna belt wear and tear
resolved.summary: Small cavanna belt on Truffle Line showing signs of wear at 00:13, maintenance called.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 05:02 — "Cavana belt is fixed" (TruffleLine Enrober).
